creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
I installed py27-pickleshare-0.7.3

When I try to use it:

Python 2.7.12 (default, Sep 18 2016, 16:50:51) 
[GCC 4.2.1 Compatible FreeBSD Clang 3.4.1 (tags/RELEASE_34/dot1-final 208032)] on freebsd10
Type "help", "copyright", "credits" or "license" for more information.
>>> import pickleshare
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<stdin>", line 1, in <module>
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/pickleshare.py", line 45, in <module>
    from pathlib2 import Path
ImportError: No module named pathlib2
>>>
